text:
• An unstable insulin dependent or noninsulin dependent diabetic would 
require FBS more frequently than once per month if ordered by the 
physician or allowed practitioner. 

• Where there is a new diagnosis or where there has been a recent 
exacerbation, but the patient is not unstable, monitoring once per month 
would be reasonable and necessary. 

• A stable insulin or noninsulin dependent diabetic would require 
monitoring every 2-3 months.
